description: Cumulative v0.4.0 → v0.4.6 diff for glm-plugin-cc. 8336 diff lines / 84 files / 6623 insertions / 480 deletions. Captures five release cycles of work: v0.4.1 setup hardening, v0.4.2/3 preset system, v0.4.4 setup interactive menu + npm scope rename, v0.4.5 schema/echo defenses, v0.4.6 BigModel error-code dispatch + retry/backoff + verify-release.yml retirement. Chosen as the C3 large-diff fixture because it approaches the 9200-line scale where the 2026-04-21 workflow-governor cross-review session produced fabricated citations — intentionally stresses GLM with a realistic large diff from a project it knows.
notes: C2 is a strict subset of C3 (8fc1b98...d5fa754 ⊂ v0.4.0...d5fa754), so findings that appear in both give a direct diff-scale comparison.

Head ref is v0.4.6 (d5fa754) not HEAD, because reviewing current HEAD would include the review-eval harness itself — a diff containing this very fixture's diff.patch would create recursive meta-noise that biases the experiment.

The fixture is intentionally 'messy': mixed CI/docs/test/code additions across 5 releases. This matches real-world large-diff review requests (release-train aftermath, project-wide refactor) where GLM's attention is spread across many domains.
